ibisAccount の端末認証機能は、アイビス製品へのアクセスを組織に承認されたパソコンのみに限定し、未承認のパソコンからのアクセスを全てブロックします。

ibisAccount (アイビスアカウント) は、アイビス製品のログイン認証と決済機能を提供するゼロトラストセキュリティに対応したアカウントシステムです。

「端末認証機能」を利用することで、アイビス製品へのアクセスを会社や学校などの組織に承認されたパソコンのみに限定することができます。個人所有のパソコンや、組織内の未承認のパソコンからのアクセスをすべてブロックすることができるため、高いセキュリティレベルを維持しながら、アイビス製品を安心・安全にご利用頂くことができます。

【端末認証機能の使い方】
1. ibisAccount の Chrome 拡張機能を Chrome にインストールします。
2. ibisAccount (https://account.ibis.ne.jp/) の製品ページを開いてログインします。手順に従って操作を進め、組織の管理者に端末利用申請を送信します。
3. 組織の管理者が端末利用申請を承認すると自分宛てにメールが届くので、再度 ibisAccount の製品ページからログインします。
4. これにより、管理者に承認されたパソコン以外からは ibisAccount にログインすることができなくなります。

【ibisAccount 対応製品】
ibisStorage (https://storage.ibis.ne.jp/)

ibisStorage (アイビスストレージ) は、ゼロトラストセキュリティ対応のセキュアなクラウドストレージです。
[Numih] Lecteur de cartes Vitale pour dh
Lecteur de cartes Vitale de Numih France

La carte Vitale® est une carte à puce qui contient tous les renseignements administratifs nécessaires à la prise en charge des soins de toute personne affiliée à l'assurance maladie française.

Cette extension, mise à disposition par Numih France (ex mipih, ex SIB), doit permettre aux professionnels des hôpitaux publics français de pouvoir lire facilement et de manière sécurisée les données des cartes Vitale des assurés depuis un navigateur web.

C'est un programme natif externe qui se charge de piloter le lecteur de cartes Vitale du poste de travail de l'utilisateur pour lire les données.

Extension companion for various enterprise web apps / Pomoćna aplikacija za poslovna softverska rešenja

The electronic application for subsidies per bee hive works as follows:
• Applies to the web portal application via an external IP address,
• The user logs in as a guest on the application, or using their username and password,
• Completes a pre-defined grant application web form,
• Clicking on the request button creates a pdf request document and an xml document to be signed,
• The user is shown a modal window where he signs an application for a subsidy using an electronic certificate,
• After successful signing, the grant application is displayed in the office, and is still recorded under the number received by the e-government.

Access saved passwords from Scanguard's Password Vault, including the ability to generate and save a new password.

This extension works with the Password Vault provided by the Scanguard application. Instead of manually searching for a password within Scanguard, you can now search the vault directly from any web page.

Simply click one of the icons added by the extension to get a list of possible passwords for the current website. Selecting the entry will then add your login information. If you don't currently have any passwords saved for the website, you can generate a new one to add to the vault.

The extension will detect logins to a website not stored in the vault, or if any existing entries have a different password. You'll be prompted whether you would like to save this new data.

Please note: this extension requires Scanguard v1.37+ to be installed on your PC / Mac.

Supports Yealink headset devices in achieving device integration with compatible web applications.

With this extension, you can interact with web applications using the hardware buttons on the headset. The web applications are browser-based unified communication clients.

Web application requirements:

Integrated with the "Yealink Web SDK"
Web client requirements:

Installed "Yealink USB Web Host" on Windows or macOS operating systems
Use Google Chrome or Microsoft Edge browsers to access the web application
Ultera application extension provided by IPD Solutions 3270 host integration.

Background service_worker that can access the copypasteBackground.js page. This script does not have access to the web page. It listens for posted messages from the content script to perform to get and set value to public variable.

Host integration extension code which exchanges messages to/from content script
based on integration with native application message exchange with .net host application.

Message flow:
browser window.dispatchevent -> (content script)MessageAaptor.sendMessage->
 			(extension)MessageConnector.connectsendNativeMessage->
				(content script)MessageAdaptor.onMessage.addListener 

Receives message from content script which manages native application message exchange to hostName application. Host name must be registered in windows registry!
Alam Emirates ID Reader to read emirates ID data in google chrome through console app available at codingsips.com.

Read Emirates ID in google chrome web browser by communicating to console app developed by ALAM you can read more at codingsips.com

This Extension is developed to communicate with console application.

www.ica.gov.ae provide SDK for Desktop application with DLL to directly read from the card instead of sending request to server and fetch data from there.
So in web application it was almost impossible.

Difinitly your clients must be limited and they must have dlls and a console app should be there, which on launching reads the card and if valid card is there it copies card data to clipboard.
This extension will initiate and run that console app in background
will wait untill cardreader responses back with valid data or error message
using this extension we will be able to read client clipboard and populate required information in specified objects(s) on the webpage
it do require to create some registry items
search at codingsips.com

This extension can open up local folder link or the folder of the local file link when you click on it. Configure the "href" attribute of the anchor with the folder or the file link so that it starts with the "file:///" prefix. The anchor must contain the attribute "folder-opener", and you have to install the native app. When you click on the link the file explorer will open the folder of the link.
perc.pass is a simple and secure password management tool.

Designed for teams, companies, and individual users. It allows for the safe storage, organisation, and sharing of access data within project groups, ensuring complete control and privacy at every stage.

🔐 Maximum security

Due to advanced symmetric and asymmetric cryptography and the zero-knowledge principle, only you have access to your passwords. Your main password is never stored or transmitted to any servers, ensuring all your data remains entirely under your control.

📍 Compliance with RODO, NIS2 and DORA

Data is encrypted and securely stored in certified Polish Data Centers, complying with GDPR/RODO regulations and adhering to the latest NIS2 and DORA cybersecurity directives. 

⚡ Auto-fill and password generator

Our integrated browser plug-ins and mobile apps enable swift logins, auto-fill, and on-demand generation of strong passwords.

🔄 Shared entries and one-time links

Securely storing passwords, notes, and credit card information in one place allows for effortless data sharing, ensuring maximum protection and convenience while enhancing organization and team collaboration.

One-time, encrypted links enable swift and secure sharing of access data and notes with clients and subcontractors while eliminating risks and avoiding unnecessary complications.

📊 Security and activity monitoring

Safeguard your data with automatic password breach detection, enabling instant response to potential threats. Monitor user activity through detailed administrative logs and easily export data for audits in compliance with NIS2 and DORA cybersecurity regulations. Maintain full control and confidence, knowing your information is always protected and aligned with the highest security standards.

🔎 Learn more

Ensure the security of your data with perc.pass - download now and protect your passwords in a simple yet effective way!

For more information, visit: percpass.com

Introducing "Simply Code Beautify" Chrome Extension

Are you tired of dealing with messy and unorganized code while browsing the web? Look no further! Introducing "Simply Code Beautify," a powerful Chrome extension designed to streamline your coding experience. With a range of features and customization options, it's the ultimate tool for web developers and enthusiasts.

Key Features:

Automatic Code Detection: "Simply Code Beautify" can automatically identify whether the webpage you're visiting contains CSS or JavaScript code. No need to manually analyze the source code anymore!

Code Beautification on Demand: Once the extension detects code, it will prompt you to beautify it with a simple confirmation. Say goodbye to poorly formatted code blocks cluttering your view.

Multiple Themes and Customization: We understand that everyone has their preferred coding style. That's why our extension offers a variety of themes and customizable settings, allowing you to tailor your coding environment to your liking.

Free and User-Friendly: "Simply Code Beautify" is entirely free to use and easy to navigate. No hidden costs, no complicated instructions – just a seamless coding experience.

We Value Your Feedback: We're constantly striving to improve our extension. If you have any feedback, suggestions, or encounter issues, please don't hesitate to reach out to us at httzip@gmail.com. Your input helps us make "Simply Code Beautify" even better!

Experience the convenience and efficiency of organized code with "Simply Code Beautify." Download it now from the Chrome Web Store and take your web development journey to the next level. Happy coding!

Programme de génération et d'impression documentaire de Numih France

Cette extension, mise à disposition par le Numih France (ex MiPih, ex SIB), doit permettre aux agents administratifs des hôpitaux publics français de pouvoir facilement générer et imprimer les documents administratifs à destination des usagers.

C'est un programme natif externe qui se chargera de générer le document à imprimer.
For data encryption and auto login to websites. Compatible with NFC products using Freemindtronic® technology.

Our free extension is an interface between the websites you visit and a  NFC HSM device using Freemindtronic® technology paired through a QR code with our (FMT) application for NFC phones available on Google Play. The extension offers secure management of your secrets with an easy and efficient use.

It is optimized to improve your online security by using top-of-the-line encryption methods to protect your passwords, cryptocurrency information, and sensitive data called secrets. You store your secrets in your contactless NFC device.

The extension has features such as a password generator, a QR code generator, and an automatic warning system for domain name extension types to protect you against domain name extension scams. These features can be used without the NFC device.

Our extension is also designed to offer you maximum security for your data by automatically encrypting secret exchanges on the local network, texts, and files. Field auto-filling is also encrypted to protect against hacking risks. Auto login to an internet account makes your life easier (similar to passwordless). Our extension is also compatible with OTP (One Time Password) authentication systems for enhanced security of your online accounts.

It is easy to use and guarantees the confidentiality of your data.

It is particularly useful for users of password managers, cryptocurrencies, data encryption, and OTP authentication who are looking to enhance the security of their online information.
Download our free extension now and enjoy peace of mind knowing that your sensitive information is protected."
